gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/153)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/153)
text: شُكْرُ النِّعْمَةِ اجْتِنَابُ الْمَحَارِمِ وَ تَمَامُ الشُّكْرِ قَوْلُ الرَّجُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from one of our companions, from Muhammad Bin Hisham, from Muyassar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Gratefulness of the Bounties is keeping away from the Prohibitions, and the completion of the gratefulness is the speech of the man (saying) ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the worlds’’.
en.sarwar: 10. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from certain individuals of our people from Muhammad ibn Hisham from Muyassir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Not to commit unlawful acts is a form of expressing thanks for a bounty. A complete expression of thankfulness is that one says, “All praise belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds.””’
